deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K. Current mortgage $164K, equity ~$101K.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report, build analysis sheet, lock template for second deal

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development opportunity. Title defect: incomplete legal description on Partition Deed (Exhibits C & F). Correction Deed prepared by attorney Van Hutchins. Sisters ended listing after March. Isaac Linares mobile home development concept (~$150K offer) did not move forward.
deals.next: Listing canceled, signs picked up. Deal closed out.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Walking away from deal. Signs retrieved from property.
Isaac development angle: mobile home development on property. Half units for displaced veterans, half for profit. Isaac offered ~$150K if project moves forward. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball confirmed title defect. Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title (Jessica Guevara) to review.
Chris updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Sisters excited about Isaac Linares development interest.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 2,972 sqft including permitted converted garage. 1994 build. Pool (tile repair needed), outdoor kitchen, wood fireplace. Underwater: payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K, underwater by $93K-$143K. Chandler laid off May 22. Short sale, assumption, or bring cash were three paths presented.
deals.next: Mutual termination May 29. Plan to update and relist when ready.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back in. Plan: make updates and repairs, relist when timing is right.
Call with Matt and Chandler at 11am. Chandler was laid off (hardship documented). Full financial picture and three paths presented. Leaning toward short sale.

Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis: $5,300-$6,000+ carrying costs monthly. Comp 717 Jack Nicklaus at $519K signals pricing issue. Three options highlighted: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.
208 DOM, underwater, double-carrying (apartment + mortgage). Critically needs price strategy conversation.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold, landlord selling duplex. Pivoting to new construction (no HOA requirement). Previously pre-approved ~$122K via Zach S. Now evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal (Corpus) at $85K via Isaac Linares. FHA 203(k) for rehab, two structures (one livable, one teardown). Out of Saxet deal as of June 1. Still searching.
deals.next: Confirm Zach pre-approval status. Continue new construction search (no HOA).

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
New direction: Isaac Linares wholesale deal 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Two structures (livable + 2BR teardown). FHA 203(k) angle for rehab. Zach S sent property info for evaluation.
916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, 2011 roof. Pass. Chris introduced new construction idea - rate buydowns, incentives. Open to pivoting entirely to new construction.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft on 4.05 acres. Frio County, Pearsall ISD. Divorce situation. Prior sale $210K (listed $235K/180 DOM). Payoff: $255,578 as of Feb 2026 (~$257K today). Need ~$285K-$290K minimum to walk with proceeds. Recommended range: $275K-$315K. CMA pulled May 15. Thin market (3 comps in 10 miles).
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed: $255,578 as of Feb 17, 2026. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Built listing presentation with net sheet.
Prior clients - Chris helped with original VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build, Laura Heights PUD. Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC, second week of June deadline (high urgency). List price $259,900. Payoff discrepancy: seller says $170K, public records $192K (verify). Potential hairline foundation crack. Insurance adjuster completed roof inspection May 11.
deals.next: Confirm showing times. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. Kept conversation open.

MLS live today. Canvassed neighborhood - neighbors friendly and interested. First showing feedback: cultural concern about street direction, not enough sqft for buyer use case. Roof adjuster completed May 11.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG - 43 photos + floorplans.
Listing consultation on-site 11am with Isaac present. Meeting went well. CMA recommended $259,900. Sellers confirmed via email.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate cash sale. Contract price $152,000. Buyer: military (Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA). Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Title cleared, funded Apr 26, closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver joy gift basket. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded. Joy gift delivery and thank you still pending.
Cleared and funded.
Lien release picked up from Michael (notary) - Fernando Castillo signed. Release delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (family member of lien holder). Willing to work with us.

deals.title: Milagros Stringer
deals.notes: New construction buyer. Budget: $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment (P+I). Brandon Moran (stepson/connector) helping coordinate. Not locked to any one builder. Rate buydowns are the financing angle. Buyer rep signed May 7. Builder options being pulled.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with lenders. Set up builder visits. Pull new construction inventory across multiple builders.

logs.m: MI Homes (Frank, sales rep) found option keeping payments under $1,200/mo. Working multiple builder options.
Intro email sent to Milagros (CC Brandon + Lauren). Buyer rep signature packet sent via Skyslope.
Buyer rep signed (Moran Buyer Rep digisign-documents-05-07-2026.pdf).

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft, 3BR/2.5BA, 2 stories, 2025 Lennar build in Grace Gardens. Rental listing never executed. Jimbo backed out May 28. Chris sent $500 to cover costs. Ended professionally on good terms.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received from Jimbo.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out. Chris sent $500 to cover time and money invested. Skyslope listing to be cleared.
Listing agreement reviewed - 12 open items. Jimbo replied same day with all answers. Rental price: $1,595/month confirmed.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers - need to review.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.contact: Kelly (Priority Bank) / Jerry Sadler / Ray Stidham
deals.notes: Bank-owned property (Priority Bank FSB). Pre-listing cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected, flooring this week, water meter pending. HouzzPro/Matt Toney contractor selected ($54,877 estimate). 3 cameras installed June 2. Drywall complete, paint finishing up, flooring starting.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm utilities. Police reports still pending. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler + Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Visited property - 3 cameras installed, fully covered. Electricians reconnected everything. Drywall complete, paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow or Thursday. Water meter pending (Kelly says 1-2 days).
Visited - drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Need update email to Kelly, Jerry, Ray with progress.
Cleanup active. Floor demo complete, drywall cut, new drywall on site. Utility providers confirmed: Medina Electric + EMCSUD.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney/San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters.
Met with Matt Toney in his office. Connected Matt with Jerry Sadler (Priority Bank) on phone call.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres (A-735 S-46 E L TAYLOR). Hunting property. Contract with Espinoza family at $113,000. Buyer's agent is Javier. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. Chicago Title opened with Alyssa Castillo. Another agent called with backup buyers interested.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email.

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family - Javier is buyer's agent. TXR 1903 sent for price update. EMD not received yet. Another agent called interested - told to submit backup offer.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.
Steve sent new photos - green screen content opportunity.
Clearing complete. Steve finished job, sent photos. Drone footage next priority.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Met through Little Red House garden share. Potential content collaboration (Healing Through Gardens story). Real estate potential is long-term, trust-based.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story (content). Keep nurturing relationship.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement + 2 daughters with disability checks (live with her). Paying $1,700/month rent. Between jobs currently. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan eligible (zero down). Nextdoor High Country neighborhood contact. Called Apr 29 - sick grandkid situation, warm conversation. Overdue for follow-up as of May 14.
leads.next: Call TODAY May 14. Check on grandkid first. Ease back into home conversation. Connect with VA lender.

logs.m: Flagged for follow-up. VA buyer, $1,700/mo rent, motivated. Do not let slip again.
Spoke today - sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation intact. Follow up tomorrow.
Confirmed: military retirement + daughters live with her. Mentioned VA benefits, zero down, lender connection.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting San Antonio area. Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 (Priority Bank property). Dumpster contractor Bryce working the renovation. Looking to purchase a home.
leads.next: Get Bryce's contact info when on-site at 181 CR. Confirm wife's VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, renting in San Antonio.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Buyer interested in property needing some work - unique situation. Caught up May 11, details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property they want. Understand financing and type of work needed.

logs.m: Caught up on May 11. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Details pending.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: (1) Uncle Jimbo rental setup 8527 Green Bliss (Grace Gardens, Lennar) - rental listing coordinate, property management referral play. (2) Mom Milagros Stringer - new construction buyer, $50K down, ~$1,000/month target payment. Both require builder registration on first visit.
leads.next: Green Bliss: backed out May 28 by Jimbo, $500 sent, closed out clean. Milagros: confirm pre-approval, pull new construction inventory, register as buyer's agent on first builder visit.

logs.m: Reached out to builders for inventory options. Rate buydown angles being explored across multiple builders.
Milagros buyer rep signed (Moran Buyer Rep digisign-documents-05-07-2026.pdf). Rental docs also in folder.
Met in person. Discussed Green Bliss rental setup (Jimbo, uncle) and Milagros new construction buyer (mom). Message sent offering PM options this week.

leads.title: Miss Pat - Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat (neighbor across the street) mentioned the neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns the house. Deceased was an avid gardener - hung plants on fence. Son has not been contacted yet. Community connection through Miss Pat is warm intro. Garden angle is natural entry point (honoring previous owner).
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son's name, contact info. Reach out to son - introduce as neighbor and gardener first, realtor second. Assess: keeping, renting, or selling?

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned inherited property situation. Son took over after recent passing.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor Lead
leads.detail: Met in person April 18. Investor interested in Schertz area. Buy box still unknown. Full intake needed. Multiple active deals already (Linares Capital LLC) - passing referrals on wholesale/off-market deals.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call - buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold vs rentals). Connect on active deals matching criteria.

logs.m: Met in person - investor interested in Schertz area. No details on file yet.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around the corner from 9815 Conbes. Spoke with Chris about nearby listing. That listing under contract at $275,000. Kurt wants intel on offers received and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area (Priority #2 today per notes). Set up listing timeline. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes for offer details. Report back to Kurt.

logs.m: Moving forward - pull CMA and get everything together. Priority today alongside Colton Brown prep.

Follow up with second-look buyers' agent after pre-inspection report offer - any movement toward offer?
Monitor for backup offer submission from other interested agent

priorities.notes: VA buyer paying $1,700/month rent. Military retirement income is strong qualifying asset. Overdue for follow-up as of May 14. Was dealing with sick grandkid on Apr 29. Must call TODAY to reconnect and move toward pre-approval and lender connection.

followUps.text: Call Pamela TODAY - check on grandkid health first, then ease into home conversation
Confirm VA loan eligibility - branch, service status, discharge papers
Connect with VA-approved lender once eligibility confirmed

priorities.notes: Met May 15. CMA pulled ($275K-$315K recommended range). Payoff confirmed ~$257K. Net sheet built. Need updated payoff letter from lender, listing agreement signed, professional photos scheduled. Colton considering contractor work at 181 CR 7751.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing (critical for escrow)
Get listing agreement signed - present pricing strategy using net sheet
Discuss Colton's contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751 if interested

Must register Chris as buyer agent on FIRST builder visit - critical. Pull inventory across Lennar, DR Horton, MI Homes, and other major builders in San Antonio.
